'''Sajsh''' was the owner of a curio shop in the [[Treasure Ship Row/Legends|Treasure Ship Row]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], but in actuality, his business was a front for meetings with [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].<ref name="Side Trip" />

{{Char-stub}}
